sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE202612390__Access_of_resource_using_incompatible_type_typ
sigma_rules.description: Detects activity related to CVE-2026-12390 - Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in AzeoTech DAQFactor
sigma_rules.author: CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0

sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE20269692__MojoliciousSessionsStorable_versions_through_00

sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE202654390__JTL_Shop__572_ServerSide_Template_Injection_vi

rule CDB_June_2026_Patch_Tuesday_Microsoft_Patche {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for June 2026 Patch Tuesday: Microsoft Patches 206 Vulnerabilities Including Three P"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-18"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202612390__Access_of_resource_using_i {

        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-18"
    strings:

    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-12390 - Access of resource using incompatible type "; content:"CVE-2026-12390"; nocase; sid:3499944; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-54390 - JTL Shop < 5.7.2 Server-Side Template Injec"; content:"CVE-2026-54390"; nocase; sid:4187338; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
